items.name_en: Goyard Cisalpin Briefcase embodies the timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship of the Cisalpin backpack, presented in a new form. It reinterprets the design philosophy of the Goyard house, making it a loyal companion to safely store your business and personal items while remaining stylish. Designed for modern life.

Size: 39*29*9cm

items.name_en: Goyard Jet Black Limited Edition Saint Louis Large Bag, made of new Goyardine space black canvas, unlined, soft and lightweight, reversible, front is Goyardine canvas, other side is cotton-linen knit. Two leather handles taper from thin to thick, support multiple carrying methods. It comes with a removable inner bag, hanging on one handle for quick access.
items.name_cn:
Goyard Jet Black Limited Edition Saint Louis Large Bag, made of new Goyardine space black canvas, unlined, soft and lightweight, reversible, front is Goyardine canvas, other side is cotton-linen knit. Two leather handles taper from thin to thick, support multiple carrying methods. It comes with a removable inner bag, hanging on one handle for quick access.
34 cm x 20 cm x 40 cm
🔎020146L-Space Black

No drag at all

Handles and trim are top-grain leather

items.name_en: Goyard Vendôme Shell Bag TM
items.name_cn:
Goyard Vendôme Shell Bag TM
Inheriting the brand's unique craftsmanship and exquisite techniques: detachable shoulder strap, embedded wooden details, leather corners, large zipper, yellow lining, and its unique shell shape. More modern and refined, showcasing a woman's softness and lightness. Can be worn over the shoulder or carried by hand 👇🏻👇🏻
11 colors available: Black, Brown, Red, Burgundy, Yellow, Green, Grey, White, Sky Blue, and Navy Blue. 🌈
Size: 23cm (L) x 18.5cm (H) x 10cm (W)
020205
